items.title: Police activity under way near Nancy Guthrie's home
items.description: A search has been carried out in Tuscon, Arizona, close to where the 84-year-old was abducted from nearly two weeks ago.

items.title: Watch: 'I am a survivor' Gisèle Pelicot tells BBC Newsnight
items.description: Ms Pelicot reveals it is "inconceivable" that the man she shared her life with "could have committed these horrors".

items.title: Gisèle Pelicot tells BBC: I felt crushed by horror - but I don't feel anger
items.description: In an extensive interview with Newsnight, the woman at the heart of France's biggest rape trial speaks about betrayal, healing and choosing the right ...

items.title: 'Canadians are with you,' says PM at Tumbler Ridge vigil
items.description: The Canadian prime minister attended a vigil with federal leaders and paid tribute to the eight victims.

items.title: US homeland security shutdown could mean airport delays, travel groups say
items.description: The shutdown won't affect air traffic controllers but some TSA workers may go without pay.
